items: Oral Communication on Closed Session Items Only
If you have public comment related to a Closed Session item, please post it on the links under Public Content prior to the Closed Session Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.
Public Employee Performance Evaluation (Government Code: § 54957) Title: Superintendent
Reconvene to Regular Session at Approximately 7:00 p.m.
Report Out on Closed Session from April 16, 2025
Welcome by the School Board President, Mike Wells
Additions, Deletions, or Modifications to the Agenda

If you have public comment related to a Regular Board Meeting item, please post it on the links available under Public Content prior to the Regular Board Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.
Board of Trustees Graduation/Promotions Assignments for the 2024-25 School Year
Approval of the March 26 Board Meeting Minutes
Ratification of Warrant Registers, March 1, 2025 - March 31, 2025
Approval of the School Plans for Student Achievement (SPSA) for Orion Alternative, Henry Ford, Taft, and Garfield Elementary Schools
Report from Board Members and Superintendent
Quarterly Williams Report, 3rd Quarter, January 2025 through March 2025
Other Business/Suggested Items for Future Agenda
Possible Other Business/Suggested Items for Future Agenda
Changes to the Board Meetings Calendar

llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Can I get a motion to approve. Move to approve the consent items? Is there a second? Second. All in favor? Aye.
